subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of My heart and beholder of the countenance of My Best-Beloved! Blessed art thou, and glad tidings be unto thee, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto the remembrance of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب قلبی و الناظر الی وجه محبوبی طوبی لک ثم بشری لک بما فزت بذکر المقصود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for protection, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
